ddls:
CREATE TABLE "marine_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "hour" REAL /* Hour of the day when the data was collected */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Measured wind speed in meters per second */,
  "current_speed" REAL /* Measured current speed in meters per second */,
  "water_temp" REAL /* Measured water temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "tide_height" REAL /* Measured tide height in meters */,
  "drifting" INTEGER /* Indicates whether drifting was observed (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection location */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* ID of the sensor or device used for data collection */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicator of the data quality or reliability */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Measured atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Measured humidity in percentage */,
  "wave_height" REAL /* Measured wave height in meters */,
  "vessel_id" TEXT /* ID of the vessel or buoy where the sensor is located */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel or buoy (e.g., buoy, ship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marine_data record being predicted */,
  "prediction" INTEGER /* Prediction outcome (e.g., 0 for no drifting, 1 for drifting) */,
  "cluster" INTEGER /* Cluster identifier for the prediction model used */,
  "p_s_pred" REAL /* Probability of state given prediction */,
  "p_drifting" REAL /* Probability of drifting occurring */,
  "p_not_driving" REAL /* Probability of not drifting occurring */,
  "p_pred_given_drifting" REAL /* Conditional probability of prediction given drifting */,
  "p_pred_given_not_driving" REAL /* Conditional probability of prediction given not drifting */,
  "p_drifting_given_pred" REAL /* Conditional probability of drifting given a prediction */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the prediction model used */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the prediction model */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Brief explanation or summary of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES marine_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marine data record being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, navigator, administrator) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the data access (e.g., research, navigation, administration) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES marine_data ("record_id")
)
